description: Create Navbar component with React Router links for Home and Hello World pages

userStories.title: Create Navbar component with styled navigation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create a Navbar component that displays navigation links with consistent styling.
acceptanceCriteria: Define navStyle object with display flex, justify-content center, gap 20px, padding 1rem, background #f4f4f4, border-bottom 1px solid #ccc
Create Navbar functional component that returns nav element with navStyle applied
Add two Link components: one to '/' labeled 'Home', one to '/hello' labeled 'Hello World'
